requirement_topic.en: EMC, Low-Voltage Safety, and Residual-Current Protection
requirement_topic.zh: EMC、低电压安全与剩余电流保护
requirement_topic.zht: EMC、低電壓安全與剩餘電流保護

summary.en: EV chargers in Bosnia and Herzegovina can require conformity evidence for applicable electrical safety and electromagnetic compatibility rules. For EVSE, IEC 61851-1 includes EVSE electrical safety requirements, while EMC evidence is mapped to charger-specific EMC routes and Bosnia-relevant installation practices. Residual-current protection, DC residual-current detection, protective earthing, overcurrent and surge protection, and site coordination should be documented for the final deployment.
summary.zh: 波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那的电动汽车充电桩通常需要满足适用的电气安全和电磁兼容法规。对EVSE而言，IEC 61851-1包含EVSE电气安全要求，EMC证据通常需要按充电桩专用EMC路径和波斯尼亚相关安装实践映射。剩余电流保护、直流剩余电流检测、保护接地、过流和浪涌保护及现场协调应在最终部署中形成文件。
summary.zht: 波斯尼亞和黑塞哥維那的電動汽車充電樁通常需要滿足適用的電氣安全和電磁相容法規。對EVSE而言，IEC 61851-1包含EVSE電氣安全要求，EMC證據通常需要按充電樁專用EMC路徑及波斯尼亞相關安裝實踐映射。剩餘電流保護、直流剩餘電流偵測、保護接地、過流和浪湧保護及現場協調應在最終部署中形成文件。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/35/EU Low Voltage Directive, Bosnia-aligned implementation to be verified
Directive 2014/30/EU EMC Directive, Bosnia-aligned implementation to be verified
IEC 61851-21-2 EMC route for off-board EV charging systems, current edition to be verified

summary.en: China files may include GB/T 18487.1 safety evidence, GB/T 18487.2 EMC evidence for off-board conductive supply equipment, component certificates, and site electrical drawings. These should be mapped by clause and retested where needed for Bosnia-compatible EN/IEC, site-earthing, RCD, and installation assumptions.
summary.zh: 中国资料可能包括GB/T 18487.1安全证据、GB/T 18487.2离网设备EMC证据、部件证书和现场电气图纸。应按条款映射，并在需要时按波斯尼亚兼容的EN/IEC、现场接地、RCD及安装假设进行复测。
summary.zht: 中國資料可能包括GB/T 18487.1安全證據、GB/T 18487.2離網設備EMC證據、部件證書和現場電氣圖紙。應按條款映射，並在需要時按波斯尼亞相容的EN/IEC、現場接地、RCD及安裝假設進行複測。

gap.en: The gap is often installation assumptions rather than only lab reports: earthing system, upstream breaker, RCD or RDC-DD arrangement, DC leakage handling, EMC cable routing, surge protection, short-circuit rating, enclosure IP/IK, ambient rating, and local language warnings should match the actual deployment.
gap.zh: 差距往往在安装假设而非实验室报告：接地系统、上级断路器、RCD或RDC-DD配置、直流漏电处理、EMC布线、浪涌保护、短路等级、外壳IP/IK、环境等级和本地语言警示应与实际部署一致。
gap.zht: 差距往往在安裝假設而非實驗室報告：接地系統、上級斷路器、RCD或RDC-DD配置、直流漏電處理、EMC布線、浪湧保護、短路等級、外殼IP/IK、環境等級和當地語言警示應與實際部署一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Bosnia-aligned low-voltage and EMC obligations apply; residual-current and installation protection are mandatory where required by local design, grid connection, and electrical code route
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T safety and EMC evidence supports comparison but does not replace Bosnia CE and site-installation verification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China lab reports without checking Bosnia route and Bosnia-compatible protection assumptions. Validate RCD, earthing, leakage handling, EMC design, and commissioning controls before energization.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应在未核实波斯尼亚路径及兼容性保护假设前仅依赖中国实验室报告。送电前应验证RCD、接地、漏电处理、EMC设计和调试控制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應在未核實波斯尼亞路徑及相容性保護假設前僅依賴中國實驗室報告。送電前應驗證RCD、接地、漏電處理、EMC設計和調試控制。
